LanguageData.SD_Demo_DroneHalo.label: Stellar attack drone halo (demo)
LanguageData.SD_Demo_DroneHalo.description: A minimal wearable drone controller for demo purposes. It grants a gizmo that manually launches an attack drone.
LanguageData.SD_Demo_DroneEntity.label: Stellar attack drone
LanguageData.SD_Demo_DroneEntity.description: A minimal persistent drone entity that orbits its wearer and automatically attacks enemies.
LanguageData.SD_Demo_DroneShot.label: Drone round
LanguageData.SD_Demo_DroneShot.description: The projectile fired by a stellar attack drone.
